sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104849" key="tribwnofori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐβωνο-φορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104849.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the wearing of a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίβων</foreign> (A), ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52c</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">352c</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
